title: Sclerosciadium humile
intro: Sclerosciadium humile is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Sclerosciadium humile include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Sclerosciadium humile is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in various topical preparations, such as ointments and salves.
